acds_handlers.c(3) Library Functions Manual acds_handlers.c(3)

NAME

acds_handlers.c - ACIP Discovery Server (ACDS) packet handlers with O(1) dispatch.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct acds_hash_entry_t
Hash table entry for ACDS packet type to handler mapping.

Macros


#define ACDS_HASH_SIZE 32
#define ACDS_HANDLER_COUNT 11
#define ACDS_HASH(type)

Typedefs


typedef asciichat_error_t(* acip_acds_handler_func_t) (const void *payload, size_t payload_len, acip_transport_t *transport, const char *client_ip, const acip_acds_callbacks_t *callbacks)

Functions


asciichat_error_t acip_handle_acds_packet (acip_transport_t *transport, packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, const char *client_ip, const acip_acds_callbacks_t *callbacks)
Handle incoming ACDS packet with O(1) dispatch.

Detailed Description

ACIP Discovery Server (ACDS) packet handlers with O(1) dispatch.

Implements O(1) array-based packet dispatching for ascii-chat Discovery Server. Handles ACIP packets 6000-6199: session management, WebRTC signaling, discovery, host election.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Typedef

typedef
  asciichat_error_t(* acip_acds_handler_func_t) (const void *payload,
  size_t payload_len, acip_transport_t *transport, const char *client_ip,
  const acip_acds_callbacks_t *callbacks)


Definition at line 28 of file acds_handlers.c.








Function
  Documentation




asciichat_error_t acip_handle_acds_packet
  (acip_transport_t * transport, packet_type_t type, const void *
  payload, size_t payload_len, const char * client_ip, const
  acip_acds_callbacks_t * callbacks)


Handle incoming ACDS packet with O(1) dispatch. Dispatches packet
    to appropriate callback based on type. Uses array-based lookup for
    constant-time handler selection.




Parameters


transport Transport instance for sending responses
  and accessing per-client state


type Packet type


payload Packet payload


payload_len Payload length


client_ip Client IP address string


callbacks Application callbacks


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 120 of file acds_handlers.c.


122                                                                                   {
123   if (!callbacks) {
124     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid callbacks");
125   }
126 
127   if (type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_NETWORK_QUALITY) {
128     log_info("★ ACIP_HANDLE_ACDS_PACKET: Dispatching type=%u (NETWORK_QUALITY) from %s, payload_len=%zu", type, client_ip, payload_len);
129   }
130 
131   // O(1) dispatch via hash table lookup
132   int idx = acds_handler_hash_lookup(g_acds_handler_hash, type);
133   if (idx < 0) {
134     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Unhandled ACDS packet type: %d from %s", type, client_ip);
135   }
136 
137   if (type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_NETWORK_QUALITY) {
138     log_info("★ ACIP_HANDLE_ACDS_PACKET: Found handler at index=%d", idx);
139   }
140 
141   return g_acds_handlers[idx](payload, payload_len, transport, client_ip, callbacks);
142 }






References ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, log_info,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_NETWORK_QUALITY, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by acds_client_handler(), and
    acds_websocket_client_handler().
